Course Name: STEP 1 & 2 COMBO: INQUIRY APPROACHES TO TEACHING & LESSON DESIGN
CLINICAL MEDICINE AND THE HUMAN EXPERIENCE
CAPSTONE TEACHING EXPERIENCE FOR STEM SECONDARY GRADES

Volumetric and gravimetric determinations and qualitative analysis. This course is intended for M.A. in Interdisciplinary Science majors, and may not be taken for credit for the M.S. or Ph.D. degrees in Chemistry or any other College of Science discipline. Prerequisite: SCIE 5355 , SCIE 5356 . SCIE 5371. CELL AND MOLECULAR BIOLOGY
